title: ResultText1 Property
description: Specifies the result you wish to render as a character string.
notes:
Specify the type of result rendered as a character string in the Text object.  The results available for selection will vary depending on the vision object type specified in the TextObj property.

Values

0 - None	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_NONE

Do not render result.

1 - Angle	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ANGLE

Renders Angle result values.

2 - Angle1	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ANGLE1

Renders Angle1 result values.

3 - Angle2	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ANGLE2

Renders Angle2 result values.

4 - Area	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_AREA

Renders Area result values.

5 - CameraXY	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_CAMERAXY

Renders CameraX result and Camera Y result values.

6 - CameraXY1	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_CAMERAXY1

Renders CameraX1 result and Camera Y1 result values.

7- CameraXY2	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_CAMERAXY2

Renders CameraX2 result and Camera Y2 result values.

8 - CameraXY3	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_CAMERAXY3

Renders CameraX3 result and Camera Y3 result values.

9- CameraXY4	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_CAMERAXY4

Renders CameraX4 result and Camera Y4 result values.

10 - ColorName	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_COLORNAME

Renders ColorName result values.

11 - ColorValue	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_COLORVALUE

Renders ColorValue result values.

12 - Compactness	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_COMPACTNESS

Renders Compactness result values.

13 - Contrast	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_CONTRAST

Renders Contrast result values.

14 - DefectLevel	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_DEFECTLEVEL

Renders DefectLevel result values.

15 - FitError	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_FITERROR

Renders FitError result values.

16 - FocusValue	FocusValue constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_FOCUSVALUE

Renders FocusValue result values.

17 - Holes	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_HOLES

Renders Holes result values.

18 - Length	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_LENGTH

Renders Length result values.

19 - MaxError	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_MAXERROR

Renders MaxError result values.

20 - MaxX	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_MAXX

Renders MaxX result values.

21 - MaxY	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_MAXY

Renders MaxY result values.

22 - MinX	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_MINX

Renders MinX result values.

23 - MinY	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_MINY

Renders MinY result values.

24 - Passed	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PASSED

Renders Passed result values.

25 - Perimeter	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PERIMETER

Renders Perimeter result values.

26 - PixelLength	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PIXELLENGTH

Renders PixelLength result values.

27 - PixelRadius	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PIXELRADIUS

Renders PixelRadius result values.

28 - PixelXY	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PIXELXY

Renders PixelX result and PixelY result values.

29 - PixelXY1	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PIXELXY1

Renders PixelX1 result and PixelY1 result values.

30 - PixelXY2	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PIXELXY2

Renders PixelX2 result and PixelY2 result values.

31 - PixelXY3	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PIXELXY3

Renders PixelX3 result and PixelY3 result values.

32 - PixelXY4	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_PIXELXY4

Renders PixelX4 result and PixelY4 result values.

33 - RobotXY	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ROBOTXY

Renders RobotX result and RobotY result values.

34 - RobotXY1	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ROBOTXY1

Renders RobotX1 result and RobotY1 result values.

35 - RobotXY2	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ROBOTXY2

Renders RobotX2 result and RobotY2 result values.

36 - RobotXY3	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ROBOTXY3

Renders RobotX3 result and RobotY3 result values.

37 - RobotXY4	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ROBOTXY4

Renders RobotX4 result and RobotY4 result values.

38 - Roughness	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_ROUGHNESS

Renders Roughness result values.

39 - Scale	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_SCALE

Renders Scale result values.

40 - Score	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_SCORE

Renders Score result values.

41 - Strength	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_STRENGTH

Renders Strength result values.

42 - Text	Vision constant: VISION_TEXTRESULT_TEXT

Renders Text result values.

See Also: ResultText1 Property
